title: DataProductManifest
description: Schema for a Slettix Analytics data product manifest

id.description: Unique product identifier on the form <domain>.<product> (e.g. hr.employees)

owner.description: Team or person responsible for this product

description.description: What the product contains and when it should be used

source_path.description: S3/MinIO path to the underlying data (s3://...)

format.description: Storage format of the data product

primary_key.description: Primary key column name (used for deduplication and merge)

dag_id.description: Airflow DAG ID that produces this product

max_null_rate.description: Maximum allowed fraction of null values (0 = no nulls allowed)

freshness_hours.description: Maximum allowed age of data in hours before SLA is breached

access.description: Visibility: public = anyone, restricted = requires API key

product_type.description: source = platform pipeline product, analytical = consumer-created composition

source_products.description: Product IDs this analytical product is built on (e.g. ["hr.employees"])

tags.description: Free-form tags for search and filtering
